data.title: Migrate playwright-debug SKILL.md from MCP tools to @playwright/cli commands
data.description:
## Description
Replace all 8 Playwright MCP tool references in playwright-debug SKILL.md with @playwright/cli Bash command equivalents. Update the 3-tier debugging process to use CLI commands with disk-based output.

Changes:
1. **Frontmatter**: Remove browser_* from allowed-tools. Keep: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash
2. **Pre-flight check**: Add section at top that tests @playwright/cli binary availability before starting
3. **Tier 2 migration**: Replace browser_run_code → playwright cli run-code; browser_snapshot → playwright cli snapshot; browser_console_messages → playwright cli console
4. **Tier 3 migration**: Replace browser_navigate → playwright cli navigate; browser_click → playwright cli click; browser_hover → playwright cli hover; browser_take_screenshot → playwright cli screenshot; browser_wait_for → playwright cli run-code with page.waitFor*
5. **Session management**: Use unique session names: -s=pw-debug-$(basename $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel))-$(date +%s)
6. **Output validation guards**: After each CLI command, verify output is non-empty before proceeding
7. **Binary invocation**: Use direct binary path (not npx) to avoid stdout pollution
8. **Description/token references**: Update description text and token budget to reference CLI, not MCP
9. **Reference update**: Change PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md reference to conditional (check for CLI guide first)

Preserve: 3-tier structure, token budget ratios, hypothesis-first methodology, batching principle, escalation criteria.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains no browser_* tool references in allowed-tools
  Verify: ! grep -q "browser_" <(head -10 plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md)
- [ ] SKILL.md contains @playwright/cli command patterns
  Verify: grep -q "@playwright/cli\|playwright.*cli" plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Pre-flight availability check section exists
  Verify: grep -qi "pre-flight\|availability.*check\|command -v.*playwright" plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Session names include worktree identifier
  Verify: grep -q "git rev-parse.*show-toplevel\|worktree" plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Output validation guards present
  Verify: grep -qi "non-empty\|output.*valid\|verify.*output" plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md
- [ ] All RED tests from Task 1 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-playwright-debug-cli-migration.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "FAIL" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
